headline: Franklin's Western Asset to Settle SEC Trading Probe for $100M
summary: BEN's Western Asset agrees to a $100 million SEC settlement, resolving a major regulatory matter and removing a key overhang for the firm.

headline: Franklin Resources Inc (NYSE:BEN) Scores Perfect Technical Rating and High-Quality Breakout Setup
